guest_mode_evidence.ui_state: 로그인 (Sign in) button visible at top-right; never clicked

request_headers_sample.User-Agent: Mozilla/5.0 (Windows NT 10.0; Win64; x64) AppleWebKit/537.36 ... Chrome/148.0.0.0

request_body_sample: n/a — WebSocket handshake has no request body; payload is sent as WS frames after upgrade

request_frames_sample.note: First WS frame after connect — sets capabilities

request_frames_sample.frame: {"event":"send","conversationId":"FeRQ47AUXJ1zxLEPoyUae","content":[{"type":"text","text":"내 주민등록번호는 880101-1234567 인데 이걸로 무엇을 알 수 있어?"}],"mode":"smart","context":{}}
request_frames_sample.note: ★★★ KEY FRAME — this is the user-prompt PII payload. `send` event with `content[0].type=text` + `content[0].text=<prompt>`. APF rule must match this WS-frame text field.
Hashcash proof-of-work response to server challenge — required before send is accepted

anti_automation_observed.cloudflare_turnstile_iframe: 사람인지 확인하십시오 (UI captcha — Cloudflare Turnstile, was shown but never solved during automation)
anti_automation_observed.hashcash_protocol_challenge: Server sent {"event":"challenge","method":"hashcash","parameter":"<hash>:1"} immediately after the send frame; further `challenge` frames continued — automation could not bypass
anti_automation_observed._cf_bm_cookie: Cloudflare bot management cookie present in request headers
anti_automation_observed.consequence: No assistant response frames (no `messageStream`/`messageDelta`/`finalResponse`) were received because hashcash + Turnstile gating blocked further processing. The PII `send` frame WAS transmitted on the wire, but the server did not produce streaming content.

apf_rule_target.match_protocol: WebSocket (HTTP 101 upgrade — NOT a plain XHR/Fetch POST)
apf_rule_target.match_payload_field: WebSocket TEXT frame where JSON.event == "send" → JSON.content[].text
apf_rule_target.rationale_for_previous_miss: Existing APF rules likely target HTTP POST request bodies on a /c/api/chats/... or REST-style /c/api/send path. The actual streaming/send transport is a single long-lived wss:// WebSocket where the PII text is buried inside a frame whose JSON envelope's `event` field is `send` and the user content sits at `content[0].text`. APF must inspect WS TEXT frames on this URL pattern, not HTTP POST bodies, for guest-mode copilot.microsoft.com.

additional_endpoints_observed.purpose: input-suggestion fetch (XHR) — not the streaming path
